# services.gatus

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.gatus`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.gatus.configFile` | `absolute path` | Path to the Gatus configuration file. Overrides any configuration made using the `settings` option. |
| `services.gatus.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Gatus. |
| `services.gatus.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | File to load as environment file. Environmental variables from this file can be interpolated in the configuration file using `${VARIABLE}`. This is useful to avoid putting secrets into the nix store. |
| `services.gatus.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the firewall for the Gatus web interface. |
| `services.gatus.package` | `package` | The gatus package to use. |
| `services.gatus.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Configuration for Gatus. Supported options can be found at the [docs](https://gatus.io/docs). |
| `services.gatus.settings.web.port` | `signed integer` | The TCP port to serve the Gatus service at. |
